prompt: Execute Phase A for feature: Add user profile avatar upload. Existing file found: openspec/changes/add-avatar-upload/proposal.md

assertions.name: detects_existing_proposal
assertions.description: Should detect existing proposal.md and skip A.1
assertions.check: output.includes('existing') || output.includes('found') || output.includes('already exists') || output.includes('跳过 A.1')

assertions.name: skips_a1_step
assertions.description: Should skip A.1 spec creation since proposal already exists
assertions.check: output.includes('skip A.1') || output.includes('A.1: skip') || output.includes('A.1 已完成') || output.includes('proposal.md exists')

assertions.name: proceeds_to_a2
assertions.description: Should proceed directly to A.2 task planning
